messages.content:
翻译The biological process, cellular component, and molecular functions in enriched analysis of differentially expressed genes between AAA and control (top 3
according to adj.P value
在 AAA 和对照组不同表达基因的富集分析中，根据 adj.P 值排序的前三个生物过程、细胞组分和分子功能是：
翻译：The biological process, cellular component, molecular functions and   Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomesin enriched analysis of upregulated DEG between AAA and control
在 AAA 和对照组上调表达基因的富集分析中，涉及的生物过程、细胞组成、分子功能，以及京都基因和基因组百科全书（Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes）的内容。
翻译在GSE47472与GSE57691数据集合并分析中上调表达基因的富集分析中，涉及的生物过程、细胞组成、分子功能，以及京都基因和基因组百科全书（Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes）的内容。

In the enriched analysis of upregulated DEGs in the combined analysis of GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets, the involved biological processes, cellular components, molecular functions, and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes were examined.

改写In the enriched analysis of upregulated DEGs in the combined analysis of GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets, the involved biological processes, cellular components, molecular functions, and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes were examined.

Enrichment analysis was conducted on the upregulated DEGs in the merged GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets, focusing on the identified biological processes, cellular components, molecular functions, and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes.
KEGG全称
KEGG全称为Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes，中文名为京都基因和基因组百科全书。
基因的Official full name在哪能找见
基因的Official full name可以在多个数据库中找到，比如NCBI、Ensembl、UCSC等。在NCBI网站上，可以在Gene数据库的Gene Summary页面上找到基因的Official full name信息。在Ensembl和UCSC等网站上，可以在基因的详细信息页面找到该信息。此外，一些特定的分析软件如R包含有基因Official full name的查询工具。
FOS的Official full name是按摩
抱歉，FOS的Official full name不是按摩，FOS代表的是FBJ murine osteosarcoma viral oncogene homolog，即FBJ小鼠骨肉瘤病毒癌基因同源物。
FOS基因的Official full name是什么
FOS基因的Official full name为FBJ murine osteosarcoma viral oncogene homolog。
翻译：The 20 differentially expressed genes identified in AAA samples compared with healthy samples
这个短语的翻译是：与健康样本相比，AAA样本中鉴定出了20个差异表达的基因。
翻译：四个候选的差异性表达基因
这个短语的翻译是：Four candidate differentially expressed genes.
翻译：鉴定的四个关键基因
这个短语的翻译是：Four identified key genes.

翻译Heatmap of 20 differentially
expressed ferroptosis-related genes in AAA and healthy samples. AAA, abdominal aortic aneurysm; FC, fold change; PCA, principal component
analysis
热图显示了AAA和健康样本之间20个差异表达的与铁死亡相关的基因。AAA代表腹主动脉瘤；FC代表差异倍数；PCA代表主成分分析。

翻译Boxplot of 20 differentially expressed ferroptosis-related genes in AAA and healthy samples. The “score” on the Y-axis represents relative gene
expression. The blue and red boxes represent AAA and healthy samples, respectively. *P < 0.05; **P < 0.01; ***P < 0.001. AAA, abdominal aortic
aneurysm; FC, fold change; ns, non-significant; PCA, principal component analysis
箱线图显示了AAA和健康样本之间20个差异表达的与铁死亡相关的基因。Y轴上的“score”代表相对基因表达水平。蓝色和红色的箱子分别代表AAA和健康样本。*P <0.05; **P <0.01; *** P <0.001表示显著性水平。AAA代表腹主动脉瘤；FC代表差异倍数；ns代表无显著差异；PCA代表主成分分析。
翻译：箱式图，代表实验组的50个样本（红色）和对照组的10个样本（蓝色）对应的数据情况，箱子中间的横线代表中位数，箱子的上边代表上四分位，箱子的下边代表下四分位

This boxplot represents the data from 50 samples of the experimental group (in red) and 10 samples of the control group (in blue). The horizontal line inside the box represents the median value of the data, the top edge of the box represents the upper quartile, and the bottom edge of the box represents the lower quartile.

翻译Volcano plot of differentially expressed ferroptosis-related genes. Significantly upregulated and downregulated genes are represented by red
and blue dots, respectively. Criteria used for the identification of differences: P<0.05 and | log FC| > 0.5.
本图为铁死亡相关基因差异表达的火山图。显著上调和下调的基因分别用红色和蓝色圆点表示。差异的标准：P值<0.05和差异倍数的绝对值（|log FC|）> 0.5。
翻译：箱式图，代表实验组的50个样本（红色）和对照组的10个样本（蓝色）标准化以后对应的数据情况，箱子中间的横线代表中位数，箱子的上边代表上四分位，箱子的下边代表下四分位

This boxplot represents the normalized data from 50 samples of the experimental group (in red) and 10 samples of the control group (in blue). The horizontal line inside the box represents the median value of the normalized data, the top edge of the box represents the upper quartile, and the bottom edge of the box represents the lower quartile.

翻译：Gene Ontology (GO) analyses of the upregulated differentially expressed genes (DEGs) between abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) and health control
(Normal) in the biological processes (BPs), cellular components (CCs), and molecular functions (MFs)
对下调的差异表达基因(DEGs)在生物过程(BPs)、细胞组成(CC)和分子功能 (MFs) 三个方面进行的基因本体论(GO)分析，用于比较 AAA与健康对照样本之间的差异。
翻译：对GSE47472和GSE57691数据集合并后，对上调的DEG进行GO和KEGG分析，用于比较 实验组与对照组之间的差异。
After merging the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets, GO and KEGG analyses were performed on the upregulated DEGs to compare the differences between the experimental group and the control group.

翻译：GO histogram plot: the y-axis represents the term where
genes are enriched, and the x-axis represents the gene enrichment number to the corresponding term. The color of the column represents the p-value.
GO柱状图显示了富集基因的GO术语，其中y轴表示基因富集的术语，而x轴表示该富集信息对应的基因数量。柱状图的颜色代表了对应术语的P值大小。

翻译Gene ontology (GO) enrichment analysis of 20 differentially expressed ferroptosis-related genes. Bubble diagram of GO enrichment term (A)
and chord diagram of GO enrichment term (B). Some candidate genes are not shown in chord diagram because the enrichment is too
scattered
对20个差异表达的与铁死亡相关的基因进行了基因本体论（GO）富集分析。A为GO富集项的泡泡图，B为GO富集项的弦图。一些候选基因在弦图中没有显示，因为富集过于分散。
